properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.

properties.displayName: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Email breach to credential stuffing attack chain
properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedCount = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedCount >= 5 or UniqueIPs >= 3
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 100

properties.displayName: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - AI-assisted targeted phishing campaign
properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
properties.query:
EmailEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where DeliveryAction == "Delivered"
| where AttachmentCount > 0 or UrlCount > 0
| summarize EmailCount = count(),
    UniqueRecipients = dcount(RecipientEmailAddress),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SenderFromAddress, Subject
| where EmailCount >= 3
| sort by EmailCount desc
| take 100
